content:
🚀 qxresearch-event-1 | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To serve as a learning resource for Python developers, showcasing how to build various applications with minimal code, and to provide easily understandable examples for different programming concepts.
✨ Key Features: • 50+ Python applications • 10 lines of code per application • Covers ML, DL, GUI, CV, API development
📖 Summary: This repository offers a collection of over 50 practical Python applications, each written with a maximum of 10 lines of code. It covers diverse areas like Machine Learning, GUI, Computer Vision, and API development, aiming to provide simple, understandable, and easily modifiable code examples for learning and experimentation.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
